About Us
Quality
Seafood
at Great Prices!
Aqua Blue Seafood Ltd. supplies fresh seafood daily to some of the finest restaurants in Toronto and surrounding areas. We custom process and pack seasonal fresh fish, lobster, scallops, mussels, clams and oysters to your specific order. We also provide all varieties of frozen seafood such as shrimp, scallops, king crab, lobster tails and an array of frozen fish fillets again tailored to your specific needs.
With our modern, refrigerated trucks and vans, we ensure freshness and great quality seafood. Our goal is customer satisfaction and we try to deliver our products with the fastest efficiency. We are confident in providing our customers with the best possible quality seafood at competitive pricing.
We look forward to doing business with you.
